title: solenostemon cymosus
intro: Solenostemon cymosus, also known as Coleus cymosus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Coleus or Painted Nettle. The plant has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Solenostemon cymosus include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, due to its antioxidant and antiseptic properties. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and herbal preparations may also include the use of its leaves in the form of tea or as a topical application for wound healing.
